title: iris stenophylla subsp. stenophylla
intro: Iris stenophylla subsp. stenophylla, also known as Narrow-leaved Iris, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Iris stenophylla subsp. stenophylla include the relief of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating wounds, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, or used in salves and ointments to leverage its medicinal properties.
